CREATE TABLE test_map_update (map1 Map(String, Int32), map2 Map(String, Int32));
SELECT mapUpdate(map1, map2) AS updated_map FROM test_map_update;
SELECT mapUpdate(map('key1', 1), map('key1', 2, 'key2', 3)) AS updated_map FROM test_map_update;
SELECT mapUpdate(map('key1', 5, 'key2', 10), map('key2', 20, 'key3', 30)) AS updated_map FROM test_map_update;
SELECT mapUpdate(map('key1', 0), map()) AS updated_map FROM test_map_update;
SELECT mapUpdate(map(), map('key1', 10)) AS updated_map FROM test_map_update;
SELECT mapUpdate(map('key1', null), map('key1', 20)) AS updated_map FROM test_map_update;
SELECT mapUpdate(map('key1', 1, 'key2', 2), map('key2', 3, 'key3', 4)) AS updated_map FROM test_map_update;
SELECT mapUpdate(maps[1], maps[2]) AS updated_map FROM nested_map_test;
CREATE TABLE multi_table_test (id Int32, map_data Map(String, Int32));
INSERT INTO multi_table_test VALUES (1, map('key1', 0)), (2, map('key2', 5));
SELECT t1.id, mapUpdate(t1.map_data, map('key1', 10)) AS updated_map FROM multi_table_test AS t1 JOIN multi_table_test AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.id WHERE t1.map_data['key1'] is not null;

SELECT mapUpdate(map('key1', 1, 'key2', 2, 'key4', 0), map('key2', 3, 'key4', 4)) AS updated_map, count(*) FROM multi_table_test GROUP BY mapUpdate(map('key1', 1, 'key2', 2, 'key4', 0), map('key2', 3, 'key4', 4));
